The '''Chestrashi''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]<ref name="Galladinium" /> originating from<ref name="Planetnamia" /> [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space's]] [[Chestrashus system/Legends|Chestrashus system]].<ref name="EAOC" /> They were ruthless and made extensive use of biological warfare. By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the company [[Charendohl Exports, Limited]] manufactured the [[Chestrashi void spear]], a [[Weapon/Legends|weapon]] characteristic of the species. The void spear, which was available in extremely limited quantities, was a [[Metal/Legends|metal]] [[throwing spear]] with a tip containing thousands of microorganisms. Upon striking the target, the weapon's payload would attack their [[Bone/Legends|bone]] and [[Nervous system|central nervous systems]].<ref name="Galladinium" /> At some point between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Galladinium's Fantastic Technology]]'' is set during the [[Time/Legends|time]] period between the events of {{Film|IV}} and {{Film|V}}, which corresponds to some point between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the [[Galladinium's 50th anniversary edition|fiftieth-anniversary edition]] of ''[[Galladinium's Galactic Datalog of Fantastic Technology]]'' offered the [[Datalog/Legends|datalog's]] [[Galladinium Preferred Customers|customers]] an exclusive opportunity to purchase Chestrashi void spears.<ref name="Galladinium" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Chestrashi were introduced in ''[[Galladinium's Fantastic Technology]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook authored by [[Rick D. Stuart]] for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Galladinium" />
